# Docs coverage allowlist
# =======================
# Symbol names listed here are exempt from the docs-coverage CI gate
# (the `Docs coverage canary` step inside .github/workflows/pr.yml's
# `validate` job — driver script lives at
# .github/scripts/ci/docs-coverage.sh). Each entry is a one-line
# escape hatch — only use it when the symbol is intentionally
# exported from src/Scrapers/Pipeline/ but not part of the
# user-facing mkdocs guide under docs/.
#
# Format
# ------
#   # Reason: <why this symbol is exported but does not belong in docs/>
#   <SymbolName>
#
# Rules
# -----
#   * One symbol per line, no leading/trailing whitespace.
#   * `# …` lines are comments; blank lines are ignored.
#   * The script does whole-word matching — case-sensitive.
#   * Re-exports via barrel files (`export { Foo } from './bar.js'`)
#     are NOT scanned, so they never need allowlisting.
#   * Default exports (`export default …`) are NOT scanned for the
#     same reason — there is no symbol name to grep against docs/.
#
# When NOT to add an entry
# ------------------------
#   * If the symbol is part of the public API and a consumer might
#     reach for it from their own code → document it in docs/
#     instead. The allowlist is for genuinely-internal-but-leaked
#     names, not a way to skip documentation work.
#   * If you're mid-refactor and the symbol will be removed in the
#     same PR → drop the `export` keyword now and let the next
#     incremental commit do the cleanup; the allowlist is meant to
#     persist, not absorb in-flight churn.
#
# Maintenance
# -----------
# Review this file at least once per release. Symbols that have
# since been deleted, renamed, or properly documented should be
# removed so the allowlist does not accumulate dead entries.

# --- Phase 5: ScrapeAutoMapper cluster shared internals (PR #277) ---
# These symbols moved from the (formerly monolithic) ScrapeAutoMapper.ts
# into AutoMapperFacade/AutoMapperTypes.ts as part of the 11-sub-module
# split. They are CROSS-MODULE INTERNALS — shared types + constants
# used by BfsFieldSearch, AccountExtractor, ContainerPicker, TxnMapper,
# etc. — not part of the user-facing @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers
# public surface. They are not re-exported from lib/index.{cjs,mjs}.

# Reason: ApiRecord — internal alias `Record<string, unknown>` for API response shapes (used by AccountExtractor + BfsFieldSearch + TxnMapper). Not a stable public type.
ApiRecord
# Reason: DEFAULT_CURRENCY — internal 'ILS' fallback constant for amount normalization; bundled into transaction objects via the shim, never imported by consumers.
DEFAULT_CURRENCY
# Reason: MAX_SEARCH_DEPTH — internal BFS recursion bound for AccountExtractor field discovery; tuning constant, not user-facing.
MAX_SEARCH_DEPTH
# Reason: ScalarFieldHit — internal helper union (`string | number | false`) for findFieldValue / coerce* miss-marking. Implementation detail of the field-search algorithm.
ScalarFieldHit
# Reason: UntypedValue — internal alias of the shared JsonValue union (named to avoid Sonar S6564); retained for call-site stability across Scrape sub-modules.
UntypedValue

# --- Phase 6: PiiRedactor cluster internal scaffolding (PR #278) ---
# These symbols moved from the (formerly monolithic) PiiRedactor.ts
# into per-category sub-modules under Pipeline/Types/PiiRedactor/ as
# part of the 13-sub-module split. They are CROSS-MODULE INTERNALS
# — the per-strategy classify/redact registry contract, brand types,
# sentinel constants, and helpers consumed only by Facade.ts and the
# per-category siblings. Not part of the user-facing
# @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface and not re-exported
# from lib/index.{cjs,mjs}. (The user-facing `redact()` entry point
# is documented in docs/ and so is NOT in this allowlist.)

# Reason: CATEGORY — each strategy module's PiiCategory literal, consumed by Facade STRATEGY_REGISTRY dispatch. Not user-facing — consumers use the unified `redact()` entry point.
CATEGORY
# Reason: JSON_BODY_CATEGORY — JsonBody.ts's strategy-registry category literal; same role as CATEGORY for the JSON walker.
JSON_BODY_CATEGORY
# Reason: URL_CATEGORY — Url.ts's strategy-registry category literal; same role as CATEGORY for URL redaction.
URL_CATEGORY
# Reason: ERROR_LOG_CATEGORY — ErrorLog.ts's strategy-registry category literal; same role as CATEGORY for error/log message redaction.
ERROR_LOG_CATEGORY
# Reason: TOKEN_CATEGORY — AuthCredentials.ts category literal for bearer-token classification within the always-redact credential bucket.
TOKEN_CATEGORY
# Reason: OTP_CATEGORY — AuthCredentials.ts category literal for one-time-password classification within the always-redact credential bucket.
OTP_CATEGORY
# Reason: COOKIE_CATEGORY — AuthCredentials.ts category literal for cookie/setCookie classification within the always-redact credential bucket.
COOKIE_CATEGORY
# Reason: PiiCategory — branded union type of all classifier outcomes; consumed only by Facade dispatch and the per-category modules' classify() return type.
PiiCategory
# Reason: PiiClassifierBool — Brand<boolean> tag for per-strategy classify() return values; type-system-only, no runtime surface.
PiiClassifierBool
# Reason: PiiCountInt — Brand<number> tag for counted-thing redaction outputs (e.g., name length class); type-system-only.
PiiCountInt
# Reason: PiiHintString — Brand<string> tag for redaction-output strings; type-system-only, never imported by consumers (they see plain string).
PiiHintString
# Reason: JsonValue — recursive JSON union consumed by JsonBody walker + Facade dispatch; identical to the prior internal alias on the pre-split PiiRedactor.ts.
JsonValue
# Reason: JsonScalar — JSON leaf-type alias (string|number|boolean|null); component of JsonValue, used only by JsonBody.
JsonScalar
# Reason: JsonArray — readonly JsonValue[] alias; component of JsonValue, used only by JsonBody walker.
JsonArray
# Reason: IJsonObject — `{readonly [k:string]: JsonValue}` shape; component of JsonValue, used only by JsonBody walker.
IJsonObject
# Reason: REDACTED_HINT — `[REDACTED]` literal sentinel returned by default-deny; held in Types.ts so every per-category module can import it without a Facade dependency cycle.
REDACTED_HINT
# Reason: REDACTION_ERROR_HINT — `[REDACTION_ERROR]` literal sentinel returned by the unified `redact()` catch block; same anti-cycle reason as REDACTED_HINT.
REDACTION_ERROR_HINT
# Reason: OTP_HINT — `[OTP]` literal sentinel returned by the OTP strategy; held in Types.ts so per-category modules + AuthCredentials.ts import the constant instead of hardcoding the literal (CR cycle-1 #9 / §13 sentinel ban).
OTP_HINT
# Reason: AMOUNT_NEGATIVE_HINT — `-***` literal sentinel returned by the Amount strategy for negative magnitudes; held in Types.ts so log readers / fixtures / test snapshots share one definition (CR cycle-2 / §13 broadened sentinel ban).
AMOUNT_NEGATIVE_HINT
# Reason: AMOUNT_POSITIVE_HINT — `+***` literal sentinel returned by the Amount strategy for positive magnitudes; same reason as AMOUNT_NEGATIVE_HINT.
AMOUNT_POSITIVE_HINT
# Reason: isPiiRedactionDisabled — boolean flag derived from PII_REDACTION env var; consumed by per-category modules to honor the bypass (credentials excluded).
isPiiRedactionDisabled
# Reason: CensorFn — internal type alias for the Pino censor callback shape; consumed by createCensorFn + Pino logger config wiring.
CensorFn
# Reason: CensorValue — internal type for the value-position argument Pino passes into the censor function; component of CensorFn.
CensorValue
# Reason: classifyKey — key-tail-to-category lookup used internally by createCensorFn to drive PATH_TAIL_TO_CATEGORY dispatch; not invoked by user code.
classifyKey
# Reason: createCensorFn — factory that builds the Pino censor callback from the strategy registry; wired by the Pipeline logger config, never called from user code.
createCensorFn
# Reason: PATH_TAIL_TO_CATEGORY — Pino payload key-tail to PiiCategory mapping table; static dispatch data for createCensorFn.
PATH_TAIL_TO_CATEGORY
# Reason: looksLikeToken — AuthCredentials.ts heuristic classifier for bearer-token-shaped values; component of the always-redact credential bucket.
looksLikeToken
# Reason: looksLikeOtp — AuthCredentials.ts heuristic classifier for one-time-password-shaped values; component of the always-redact credential bucket.
looksLikeOtp
# Reason: looksLikeCookie — AuthCredentials.ts heuristic classifier for cookie/setCookie-shaped values; component of the always-redact credential bucket.
looksLikeCookie
# Reason: PII_QUERY_KEYS — Url.ts list of query-string parameter names that must be redacted; static dispatch data for URL redaction.
PII_QUERY_KEYS
# Reason: SENSITIVE_SCRAPER_ENUMS — ErrorLog.ts allowlist of ScraperErrorTypes enum values that must never be log-interpolated (CodeQL #28); static dispatch data for redactSensitiveEnum.
SENSITIVE_SCRAPER_ENUMS
# Reason: buildSegmenter — CommonHelpers.ts factory returning a Unicode Intl.Segmenter for accurate grapheme counting; used by length-class hints in Name/Merchant.
buildSegmenter
# Reason: graphemeCount — CommonHelpers.ts grapheme-cluster counter built on buildSegmenter; consumed only by per-category length-class hint logic.
graphemeCount

# --- Phase 6 follow-up: CR review #5 shared-table extract (PR #278) ---
# Reason: LITERAL_TEXT_PII_PATTERNS — CommonHelpers.ts regex table shared by JsonBody.applyFallbackPatterns AND Html.redactHtml; extracted from the two former duplicate constants per CR review finding #5 (DRY / no-duplication guideline).
LITERAL_TEXT_PII_PATTERNS

# --- Phase 8.5a / Network canonical-10 drain (PR pending) ---
# All entries below are internal helpers exposed by the focused sub-modules
# under Mediator/Network/Fetch/ and Mediator/Network/AuthDiscovery/. They
# are composed by their parent module (and consumed by the legacy shim's
# re-export) and intentionally NOT part of the user-facing Pipeline API.
# The barrel (index.ts) re-exports only the historical public surface.

# Reason: getJsonHeaders — Fetch/Headers.ts JSON Content-Type/Accept builder; composed inside fetchPost/fetchGet to keep the parent functions <=10 LoC.
getJsonHeaders
# Reason: LogEmitted — Fetch/Logging.ts Brand<true> tag for log-emit functions; type-system-only, satisfies Rule #15 (no exported primitive returns).
LogEmitted
# Reason: logApiCall — Fetch/Logging.ts emit helper invoked by NativeFetch + PageFetchPost; centralizes the request-start LOG.info shape.
logApiCall
# Reason: logResponseIssues — Fetch/Logging.ts emit helper invoked by parseGetResult/parsePostResult; centralizes the response-anomaly LOG.warn shape.
logResponseIssues
# Reason: IFetchGraphqlOptions — Fetch/NativeFetch.ts option-bag interface for fetchGraphql; shared between the native call site and its test fixtures.
IFetchGraphqlOptions
# Reason: fetchGraphql — Fetch/NativeFetch.ts thin wrapper over fetchPost with GraphQL Content-Type defaults; re-exported by the Fetch barrel for historical callers.
fetchGraphql
# Reason: fetchGetWithinPage — Fetch/PageFetchGet.ts page-context evaluate() wrapper; re-exported by the Fetch barrel for historical callers (BALANCE-RESOLVE + SCRAPE).
fetchGetWithinPage
# Reason: fetchGetWithinPageWithHeaders — Fetch/PageFetchGet.ts variant of fetchGetWithinPage with explicit request headers; re-exported for historical callers.
fetchGetWithinPageWithHeaders
# Reason: IFetchPostOptions — Fetch/PageFetchPost.ts option-bag interface for fetchPostWithinPage; shared between the page-eval call site and its test fixtures.
IFetchPostOptions
# Reason: fetchPostWithinPage — Fetch/PageFetchPost.ts page-context POST evaluate() wrapper; re-exported by the Fetch barrel for historical callers (BALANCE-RESOLVE + SCRAPE).
fetchPostWithinPage
# Reason: EMPTY_RESULT — Fetch/ParseResult.ts sentinel literal returned by parseGetResult/parsePostResult on empty bodies; centralized to avoid sentinel duplication across sub-modules.
EMPTY_RESULT
# Reason: IParseErrorOpts — Fetch/ParseResult.ts option-bag interface for handleParseError; composed by parseGetResult/parsePostResult.
IParseErrorOpts
# Reason: IParseGetOpts — Fetch/ParseResult.ts option-bag interface for parseGetResult; composed by NativeFetch + PageFetchGet sub-modules.
IParseGetOpts
# Reason: IParsePostOpts — Fetch/ParseResult.ts option-bag interface for parsePostResult; composed by NativeFetch + PageFetchPost sub-modules.
IParsePostOpts
# Reason: handleParseError — Fetch/ParseResult.ts shared catch-block helper that emits LOG.warn + returns EMPTY_RESULT; composed by parseGetResult/parsePostResult.
handleParseError
# Reason: parseGetResult — Fetch/ParseResult.ts shared response-parser for GET-style calls; composed by NativeFetch.parseFetchGetResponse + PageFetchGet.evaluateGet.
parseGetResult
# Reason: parsePostResult — Fetch/ParseResult.ts shared response-parser for POST-style calls; composed by NativeFetch.fetchPost + PageFetchPost.runPostEvaluate.
parsePostResult
# Reason: WafBlockDescription — Fetch/WafDetection.ts Brand<string> tag for WAF detection results; type-system-only, consumed only by WafBlockError construction.
WafBlockDescription
# Reason: detectWafBlock — Fetch/WafDetection.ts shared detector invoked by fetchPost + fetchGet to short-circuit response parsing on WAF interception; re-exported by the Fetch barrel for historical callers.
detectWafBlock
# Reason: extractAuthHeader — AuthDiscovery/HeadersTier.ts per-endpoint header-extraction helper; composed by Tier 1 (discoverFromHeaders).
extractAuthHeader
# Reason: searchBodyForToken — AuthDiscovery/ResponseTier.ts response-body walker that finds WellKnown token fields (flat + 1 level nested); composed by Tier 2 (discoverFromResponses).
searchBodyForToken
# Reason: readMainStorageRaw — AuthDiscovery/StorageMain.ts raw sessionStorage reader for the main page frame; composed by Tier 3a (discoverFromStorage).
readMainStorageRaw
# Reason: readAllJsonStorageValues — AuthDiscovery/StorageScanAll.ts JSON-shape filter over sessionStorage keys in a single frame; composed by Tier 3c (discoverFromAllStorageKeys).
readAllJsonStorageValues
# Reason: checkOneValue — AuthDiscovery/StorageFrames.ts single-value token extractor with JSON-then-raw fallback; composed by Tier 3b (discoverFromAllFrames).
checkOneValue
# Reason: handleToToken — AuthDiscovery/PollTier.ts Playwright JSHandle-to-token resolver; composed by Tier 4 (pollForAuthModule).
handleToToken
# Reason: TOKEN_BODY_FIELDS — AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts WellKnown auth-body field-name table; static dispatch data shared by ResponseTier search logic.
TOKEN_BODY_FIELDS
# Reason: STORAGE_AUTH_KEYS — AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts WellKnown sessionStorage key-name table; static dispatch data shared by StorageMain + StorageFrames.
STORAGE_AUTH_KEYS
# Reason: AUTH_POLL_TIMEOUT — AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts polling timeout constant (ms); consumed by PollTier.buildFrameWaiter.
AUTH_POLL_TIMEOUT
# Reason: AUTH_POLL_INTERVAL — AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts polling interval constant (ms); consumed by PollTier.buildFrameWaiter.
AUTH_POLL_INTERVAL
# Reason: IStorageAuth — AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts parsed JSON-storage auth shape; consumed by extractFromParsed in tryParseJsonToken.
IStorageAuth
# Reason: PrefixedAuthToken — AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts Brand<string> tag for prefixToken's return type; type-system-only, satisfies Rule #15.
PrefixedAuthToken
# Reason: prefixToken — AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts auth-scheme prefix helper (CALAuthScheme/Bearer); composed by ResponseTier + StorageFrames.
prefixToken
# Reason: tryParseJsonToken — AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts safe JSON-parse-and-extract for sessionStorage-stored auth blobs; composed by StorageMain + StorageFrames + StorageScanAll + PollTier.
tryParseJsonToken
